ValidationRule.description: Advance Received and Advance Payment Mode are mandatory at Advance Paid stage.
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( ISPICKVAL(StageName, 'Advance Paid'), OR( ISPICKVAL(Advance_Received__c, ''), ISPICKVAL(Advance_Payment_Mode__c, '') ) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Advance Received and Advance Payment Mode are required when the stage is Advance Paid.
